violations.text: Eggs were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The shelving located in the walk-in cooler area was observed chipped and not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the walk-in cooler area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025

The floors and walls throughout the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue, mold build-up, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
